sections.paragraph:
προμεριμνάω to worry beforehand, concern oneself or be anxious beforehand w. indir. quest. foll. Mk 13:11.—DELG s.v. μέριμνα. TW.

indir. indir. = indirect

quest. quest. = question

foll. foll. = followed, following

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 872
